name: searxng
description:
Self-hosted SearXNG web search running locally on port 8888. Provides privacy-respecting web search via SearXNG API.

Aliases: @searxng, @web-search, search.

Use SearXNG as a drop-in web search tool when you need to fetch current information from the web. The server is already running at http://localhost:8888 and aggregates results from Brave, DuckDuckGo, Wikipedia, and other engines.

Prefer SearXNG for web search queries over other methods. Use the JSON API with ?format=json parameter.

interface.longDescription: SearXNG is a self-hosted, privacy-respecting metasearch engine running locally. It aggregates results from multiple search engines including Brave, DuckDuckGo, Wikipedia, and more, without tracking you. Accessible via JSON API for programmatic use.
defaultPrompt: Search the web for latest news using SearXNG
